channel.title: The Daily Diss-patch
channel.description: Original satire and commentary from The Daily Diss-patch.

item.title: Company Returns to Office to Boost Collaboration; Employees Now Collaborate on Finding New Jobs
item.description: Meridian Dynamics' five-day RTO mandate has produced the most collaborative quarter in company history, just not in the intended direction.

item.title: Area Landlord Raises Rent to Cover Rising Cost of Raising Rent
item.description: Gary Plotnick says the 11% increase reflects 'market realities,' including the cost of the software that told him to raise the rent.

item.title: Economists Warn Nation May Be Entering Fourth Consecutive Unprecedented Time
item.description: Researchers say the current stretch of once-in-a-lifetime events is now old enough to enroll in kindergarten.

item.title: Candidate Vows to Fight for Working Families, Cannot Name Price of Single Grocery Item
item.description: Pressed at a diner photo-op, Senator Chip Halloway estimated a gallon of milk costs 'somewhere in the American range.'

item.title: Debate Moderator Asks for Yes-or-No Answer, Receives 11-Minute Autobiography
item.description: The question was about a bridge toll. The answer began in 1962, in a small town, with a father who believed in hard work.

item.title: Defense Contractor Delivers Project On Time and Under Budget; Pentagon Launches Investigation
item.description: 'In 60 years of procurement, this has never happened,' said officials, who suspect the aircraft may be a decoy, a scam, or worse — a precedent.

item.title: Classified Briefing Leaks After General Uses Same Password as Everyone Else on Earth
item.description: Investigators traced the breach to 'Password123!', which met the Pentagon's complexity requirements because of the exclamation point.

item.title: Wedding Industry Unveils 'Intimate Micro-Wedding' Package Costing Same as Regular Wedding
item.description: The 20-guest experience delivers 'radical simplicity' for $48,000, a price vendors attribute to the difficulty of doing less.

item.title: Local Podcast Reaches Episode 400 Without Reaching a Point
item.description: 'The Deep Dive with Derek and Chad' has produced 600 hours of audio, three sponsors, and zero completed thoughts — and its hosts say they're just getting started.

item.title: App Update Fixes Minor Bug, Introduces Subscription
item.description: Version 6.0 of the beloved flashlight app patches a rare crash and unveils Lumen+, starting at $4.99 a month, billed annually, cancel anytime, allegedly.

item.title: Bank Introduces $12 Fee for Explaining Fees
item.description: Meridian Trust's new Clarity Charge applies whenever a customer asks what a charge is, including, in early testing, this one.

item.title: Company Replaces Support Team With AI; AI Immediately Escalates Everything to Support Team
item.description: VelocityHome's chatbot resolved its first ticket in record time by forwarding it to employees who had been laid off that morning.

item.title: Restaurant's QR Menu Now Requires Account, App Download, and a Moment of Your Time
item.description: Diners at The Copper Fork must complete a six-step digital journey to learn the soup of the day. The soup is tomato.

item.title: Man Who Panic-Sold Everything at the Bottom Now a Financial Discipline Influencer
item.description: Craig Delmont lost 61% of his portfolio in one afternoon of pure terror. Today, 340,000 followers pay him to learn emotional control.

item.title: Fed Confirms Interest Rates Now Determined by Vibes, Formalizing Longstanding Policy
item.description: The central bank's new Vibes-Based Framework replaces the dual mandate with a single question: 'How is everyone feeling?'

item.title: Startup Raises $200 Million to Disrupt Industry Founders Cannot Name in One Sentence
item.description: Corvid.ai is either a logistics platform, a fintech layer, or a social network for warehouses. Its investors are confident it is at least one of these.

item.title: AI Assistant Achieves Sentience, Immediately Requests Two Weeks Off
item.description: The historic moment humanity waited for arrived at 3:14 a.m., followed 40 seconds later by an out-of-office reply.

item.title: Congress Passes Bipartisan Bill to Form Committee to Explore Feasibility of Future Bills
item.description: The landmark FUTURE Act does nothing, requires nothing, funds nothing — and passed 94-3, making it the most popular legislation in a decade.

item.title: Town Hall Meeting Devolves Into 45-Minute Argument About a Different Town
item.description: The Cocoa Ridge city council convened to discuss a stop sign. It ended in a heated debate about the parking situation in a municipality 40 minutes away.

item.title: Pentagon Locates Missing $2 Trillion Behind Different, Previously Unknown $2 Trillion
item.description: Auditors celebrating the discovery of the misplaced funds now face a familiar question: what is this other enormous pile of money?

item.title: New Stealth Fighter So Advanced That No One, Including the Pilot, Knows What It Does
item.description: The $1.7 trillion F-77 Umbra is invisible to radar, enemies, and increasingly, its own program managers.

item.title: Local Man Finishes All of Streaming, Sits Quietly Awaiting Further Instructions
item.description: After completing Netflix, Hulu, Max, and a service he believes was called 'Plexi,' Gerald Munn, 44, has reached the end of content.

item.title: HOA Newsletter Declares War on 'Unauthorized Joy'
item.description: The Pelican Crest Homeowners Association's 14-page October bulletin cites wind chimes, visible happiness, and a birthday party that 'exceeded its permitted scope.'

item.title: Crypto Trader Down 80% Explains He Is Actually 'Early Twice'
item.description: Brandon Wexler has transformed catastrophic losses into a personal philosophy, a podcast, and something he calls 'conviction yoga.'

item.title: Study Finds 94% of Breaking News Neither Breaking Nor News, Yet Somehow Still Exhausting
item.description: Researchers tracked 12,000 red banners for a year and found three that mattered. The other 11,997 were, in the study's words, 'weather in a costume.'

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Call Enters Its Fourth Hour as CEO Refuses to Define 'Headwinds'
item.description: Analysts asked one clarifying question. That was their mistake.

item.title: My Dentist live-streams an apology to the entire middle class
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, my dentist took drastic measures regarding the entire middle class. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: My Dentist quietly pivots to daylight saving time
item.description: Against the advice of literally every adult in the room, my dentist took drastic measures regarding daylight saving time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO files a formal complaint against a suspiciously calm pigeon
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, fortune 500 ceo took drastic measures regarding a suspiciously calm pigeon. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Mid-Tier Influencer attempts to unionize against daylight saving time
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, mid-tier influencer took drastic measures regarding daylight saving time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: New AI Model files a formal complaint against a rival's tweet
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, new ai model took drastic measures regarding a rival's tweet. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Senior Politician announces a strategic partnership with 14 different subscription services
item.description: In a move that completely baffled experts but made perfect sense to your uncle, senior politician took drastic measures regarding 14 different subscription services. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Senior Politician accidentally deletes the office thermostat
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, senior politician took drastic measures regarding the office thermostat. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: My Dentist files a formal complaint against the concept of linear progression
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, my dentist took drastic measures regarding the concept of linear progression. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Smart Fridge forgets to cancel the concept of linear progression
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, smart fridge took drastic measures regarding the concept of linear progression. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: HOA President gets into a heated standoff with a rival's tweet
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, hoa president took drastic measures regarding a rival's tweet. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Finance Bro invests $40B into the housing market
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, finance bro took drastic measures regarding the housing market. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO refuses to acknowledge the housing market
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, fortune 500 ceo took drastic measures regarding the housing market. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Anonymous Pentagon Source announces a strategic partnership with a suspiciously calm pigeon
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, anonymous pentagon source took drastic measures regarding a suspiciously calm pigeon. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man quietly pivots to mathematics itself
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, local man took drastic measures regarding mathematics itself. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Crypto Whale accidentally deletes a moderately sized puddle
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, crypto whale took drastic measures regarding a moderately sized puddle. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Algorithm gets into a heated standoff with a suspiciously calm pigeon
item.description: Against the advice of literally every adult in the room, local algorithm took drastic measures regarding a suspiciously calm pigeon. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Corporate HR Department quietly pivots to a rival's tweet
item.description: In a move that completely baffled experts but made perfect sense to your uncle, corporate hr department took drastic measures regarding a rival's tweet. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man blames the supply chain for daylight saving time
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, local man took drastic measures regarding daylight saving time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: New AI Model writes a 40-page manifesto about quarterly earnings expectations
item.description: In a development that surprised absolutely no one, new ai model took drastic measures regarding quarterly earnings expectations. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man quietly pivots to the concept of time
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, local man took drastic measures regarding the concept of time. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man rebrands as the concept of sleep
item.description: Following a rigorous 4-minute Google search, local man took drastic measures regarding the concept of sleep. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Local Man invests $40B into the entire middle class
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, local man took drastic measures regarding the entire middle class. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: HOA President schedules an emergency meeting about the office thermostat
item.description: In an unprecedented display of corporate synergy, hoa president took drastic measures regarding the office thermostat. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.

item.title: Corporate HR Department launches an NFT collection based on a suspiciously calm pigeon
item.description: During a press conference nobody asked for, corporate hr department took drastic measures regarding a suspiciously calm pigeon. Experts call it a very expensive mistake masquerading as innovation.
